challenges.title: Introduction to Deep Reinforcement Learning
challenges.description: Foundations of RL: agent-environment interaction, policies, rewards, exploration vs exploitation, and applications in game-playing, robotics, and autonomous systems.

challenges.title: Mathematical Foundations and MDPs
challenges.description: Core mathematical concepts: Markov Property, Markov Decision Processes, transition probabilities, reward functions, value functions, Bellman Equations, and dynamic programming methods.
